---
title: "Data Vision"
subtitle: "Value Driven Proposal"
author: "Karen Hovhannisyan"
date: last-modified
format:
  revealjs: 
    touch: true
    slide-number: false
    chalkboard: true

    preview-links: auto
    width: 1500
    transition: slide
    logo: "img/favicon.png"
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.0/css/all.min.css">
          <style>
            .icon-xxl { font-size: 84px; }
            .icon-xl  { font-size: 64px; }
            .icon-lg  { font-size: 48px; }
            .muted { opacity: .8 }
            .pill { border-radius: 10px; }
            .circle { border-radius: 50%; }
          </style>
---



## Objective {.smaller}

Establish **data as a strategic banking asset** by:

  
- Ensuring regulatory compliance  
- Improving operational efficiency  
- Enabling trusted decision-making  
- Accelerating AI-driven innovation across the bank  

## My Vision {.smaller}

Build a **trusted, governed, scalable, and business-driven data organization** that connects:

  
- Data Governance  
- Enterprise Data Platform  
- Analytics & Data Science  

. . .

**one operating model for the bank**

---

## Banking is Different {.smaller}

Compared with other industries, banking data must support:

::: {.incremental}

  
- Regulatory compliance  
- Data lineage and auditability  
- Confidentiality and controlled access  
- Risk transparency  
- Near real-time operational visibility  
- Consistent KPI definitions  

:::

---

##  High-Level Architecture {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR

A[Data Sources] --> B[Data Platform]
B --> C[Data Consumption]

D[Data Governance Layer] --- A
D --- B
D --- C

E[API / Services Layer] --- A
E --- B
E --- C
```



## Block 1 | Data Sources & Core Systems {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR

A1[Core Banking Systems] --> B[Ingestion Layer]
A2[CRM Systems] --> B
A3[Payments Systems] --> B
A4[Digital Channels] --> B
A5[External Data Sources] --> B
A6[Streaming Data] --> B
```

## Components {.smaller}

  
- Core Banking (accounts, transactions)  
- CRM & Customer Data  
- Payments & Cards Systems  
- Mobile / Web Applications  
- External APIs (credit bureau, fintechs)  
- Event Streams (real-time transactions)  

---

## Block 2 | Data Platform (Lakehouse) {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR

B1[Ingestion Layer] --> B2[Raw Data Lake]
B2 --> B3[Processing Layer]
B3 --> B4[Data Warehouse]
B4 --> B5[Data Marts / Feature Store]
```

## Layers {.smaller}

### Ingestion {.smaller}

- Batch ETL pipelines  
- Streaming ingestion (Kafka)  

### Raw Layer {.smaller}

  
- Unstructured & semi-structured data  
- Immutable storage  

### 3. Processing Layer {.smaller}

- Data transformations  
- Standardization & cleansing  

### 4. Data Warehouse {.smaller}

  
- Structured, curated datasets  
- Business-ready data  

### 5. Serving Layer {.smaller}

  
- Data marts  
- Feature stores for ML  
- Data Analytics

---

## Block 3 | Data Governance Layer {.smaller}


```{mermaid}
flowchart TB

G1[Data Quality]
G2[Data Lineage]
G3[Metadata Management]
G4[Master Data Management]
G5[Security & Access Control]
G6[Regulatory Compliance]
G7[Audit & Monitoring]
```

## Capabilities {.smaller}

  
- Data validation and reconciliation  
- End-to-end lineage tracking  
- Centralized metadata catalog  
- Golden customer/product records (MDM)  
- Role-based access control  
- Compliance (GDPR, Basel, etc.)  
- Full auditability  

---

# Analytics, Data Science & AI

## Block 4 | Analytics, Data Science & AI {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR

C1[BI & Reporting] --> C5[Decision Layer]
C2[Advanced Analytics] --> C5
C3[Data Science Models] --> C5
C4[AI Systems] --> C5
```

## Layers {.smaller}

### 1. BI & Reporting {.smaller}

  
- Dashboards (Tableau, Power BI)  

- Regulatory reporting  

### 2. Advanced Analytics {.smaller}

  
- SQL-based analytics  

- Python-based analysis  

### 3. Data Science {.smaller}

  
- Churn prediction  

- Fraud detection  

- Credit risk models  

### 4. AI Layer {.smaller}

  
- Recommendation systems  

- LLM-based assistants  

### 5. Decision Layer {.smaller}

  
- Campaign management  

- Automation systems  

- API-driven decisioning  

---

# 6. API & Services Layer {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR

S1[API Gateway] --> S2[Microservices]
S2 --> S3[External Consumers]
```

## Components {.smaller}

  
- Open Banking APIs  
- Internal data services  
- Microservices architecture  
- Fintech integrations  

---

# End-to-End Flow {.smaller}

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR

A[Data Sources] --> B[Ingestion]
B --> C[Data Lake]
C --> D[Processing]
D --> E[Data Warehouse]
E --> F[Data Marts / Feature Store]
F --> G[Analytics / AI]
G --> H[Decision Systems]

I[Governance Layer] --- A
I --- B
I --- C
I --- D
I --- E
I --- F
I --- G
I --- H

J[API / Services Layer] --- A
J --- B
J --- C
J --- D
J --- E
J --- F
J --- G
J --- H
```
